---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable? Why is this valuable?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any relevant examples, links, or prior art.
